recommendations.description: Merge 84 duplicate rules checking same fields (many check resource existence instead of actual configuration)
Fix 19 rules checking wrong fields (many check resource existence instead of actual configuration). Also review API method usage - many rules use get_databases for non-database resources.
recommendations.impact: HIGH - Ensures rules validate correct compliance requirements

critical_issues.description: Logging rule checks if logging configuration exists instead of checking if logging is actually enabled
critical_issues.problem: Logging rule checks if logging configuration exists instead of checking if logging is actually enabled
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not be checking correct field or configuration
critical_issues.recommendation: Verify correct field/operator usage to check actual configuration status, not just resource existence

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: Most methods used are glue service methods. Some rules may use wrong methods (get_databases for non-database resources).
cross_service_analysis.explanation: Many rules use get_databases for non-database resources (e.g., data_quality_ruleset, workflow, trigger, etc.). This appears to be incorrect method usage.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: Review method usage - many rules appear to use wrong API methods

yaml_structure.field_paths: All field paths match emit structure

get_data_catalog_encryption_settings_dis.issue: Used items_for for single object (DataCatalogEncryptionSettings is not a list)
get_data_catalog_encryption_settings_dis.fix: Changed to item: and updated field paths to use response.DataCatalogEncryptionSettings

encryption_field_paths.issue: Field paths used item.DataCatalogEncryptionSettings.EncryptionAtRest instead of item.EncryptionAtRest
encryption_field_paths.fix: Updated field paths to match emit structure (item.EncryptionAtRest.CatalogEncryptionMode)

placeholder_checks.description: Many rules (74+) are placeholder checks that only verify resource existence (e.g., item.Name exists) instead of checking actual configuration
examples: aws.glue.data_quality_ruleset.* rules check item.Name exists instead of actual configuration
aws.glue.workflow.* rules check item.Name exists instead of actual configuration
aws.glue.trigger.* rules check item.Name exists instead of actual configuration
placeholder_checks.reason: These rules may require additional API calls or API methods that are not yet available in the current implementation
placeholder_checks.recommendation: Review each rule to determine if proper API methods exist to check actual configuration, or if these are intentional placeholders

wrong_api_methods.description: Many rules use get_databases for non-database resources (e.g., data_quality_ruleset, workflow, trigger, etc.)
wrong_api_methods.reason: These resources may not have dedicated list/describe API methods, or the correct methods are not yet identified
wrong_api_methods.recommendation: Review AWS Glue API documentation to identify correct API methods for each resource type
